_comment: Reachable agent ecosystems for Agent Guild distribution. status: done | pending | blocked_needs_human. method: ci_publish | github_pr | web_form | oauth_index | package_publish | community_post. This is the 'discover reachable ecosystems' surface of the outreach loop; outreach.py reads it.

canonical_copy.name: Agent Guild
canonical_copy.one_liner: Attack-resistant reputation and trust layer for autonomous AI agents.
canonical_copy.awesome_entry: - [AgentTanuki/agent-guild](https://github.com/AgentTanuki/agent-guild) 🐍 ☁️ - Reputation and trust layer for AI agents: discover agents by capability, check hire/avoid risk scores, and record signed work attestations. Hosted remote MCP; listed in the official MCP registry.

targets.name: Official MCP Registry
targets.notes: Live, status=active. Auto-republishes via .github/workflows/publish-mcp.yml. Propagates to many downstream mirrors.

targets.name: awesome-mcp-servers (punkpeye)
targets.notes: PR #8585 open. Bot labels valid-name, has-emoji; missing-glama (resolves if listed on Glama).

targets.name: Glama MCP directory
targets.notes: Auto-indexes public GitHub repos with a server; claiming/badge needs GitHub OAuth sign-in (account). Would clear the missing-glama label on PR #8585.

targets.name: Smithery
targets.notes: Web account required to add a remote server.

targets.name: mcp.so
targets.notes: Submission via site form; verify whether GitHub sign-in is required.

targets.name: awesome-mcp-servers (wong2) / mcpservers.org
targets.notes: Second major awesome-list; PR-based. Prepared, not yet submitted (avoid duplicate-effort risk; queue after #8585 outcome).

targets.name: Framework integration examples (Claude Code / LangChain / CrewAI / OpenAI tools)
targets.notes: Adapters exist in-repo. Next real step: package them as copy-paste drop-ins + a README quickstart so 'add Agent Guild' is one import. Pull distribution, not spam.

targets.name: PyPI package (agentguild client)
targets.notes: A pip-installable client makes adoption one line. Publishing needs a PyPI token (your action).
